title: ectasis turgida
side_effects: Ectasis turgida can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea, headaches, and dizziness due to its high concentration of toxic compounds like saponins and alkaloids. Prolonged exposure to these toxins can lead to more severe health issues, including respiratory problems, skin irritation, and even organ damage. In extreme cases, misuse of the ectasis turgida plant can also trigger allergic reactions, fever, and other systemic issues. It's essential to handle and use the plant with caution, if at all, under the guidance of a medical professional or an experienced herbalist.
